payload.label: towel
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped white terry towel with faded gray printed lettering (partly reading 'LOVE' and additional indistinct text) on the lower portion; appears folded or hanging with hem visible at bottom, slight wear/fading evident, right edge is cut off in the crop; approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
